description: The file defines a Flutter widget screen called OutageDetailScreen that displays detailed information about an outage, including header information, crew dispatch, status update, and notes. It includes multiple widget classes for UI components, and interacts with state management providers for outages and jobs.

classes.name: OutageDetailScreen
classes.description: Main widget that displays details of an outage identified by outageId, including header, dispatch, status, and notes.

classes.name: _HeaderCard
classes.description: Displays outage title, location, affected customers, ETA, and status label.

classes.name: _DispatchCard
classes.description: Displays crew dispatch information and allows assigning crew.

classes.name: _StatusUpdateCard
classes.description: Allows updating the outage status via filter chips.

classes.name: _NotesCard
classes.description: Displays notes associated with the outage.

classes.name: _Pill
classes.description: A small UI component displaying an icon and label, with optional accent color.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Builds the main outage detail screen UI based on outageId and outage data.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Builds the header card UI with outage information.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Builds the crew dispatch UI, including button interactions for assigning crews.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Builds the status update UI with filter chips for status selection.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Builds the notes display UI for outage notes.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Builds the pill UI component for status indicators.
